steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content:
”The number of ______ can serve” has two key structures:
After “of” — a noun that is the object of the preposition
Before “can serve” — a noun that is the subject of the verb

steps.title: Apply noun form conventions
steps.content: Objects of prepositions and subjects of verbs appear in their base form, not possessive. Answer A) “terms presidents” correctly provides “terms” (base plural form, object of “of”) and “presidents” (base form, subject of “can serve”). The other choices incorrectly use possessives, which are not appropriate for these grammatical functions. This matches choice A — A is correct.
